title: DEKTON Wire Stripping Pliers | High-Precision Crimping Tool | Ergonomic Non-Slip Handle | Durable Steel Construction | Adjustable Stripping Gauge | Ideal for Wire Cutting, and Crimping
features: Ultimate Precision in Wire Stripping and Crimping: The DEKTON Wire Stripping Pliers are designed for unparalleled precision, making them the ideal tool for professionals who demand accuracy in every task. With an adjustable stripping gauge, you can customize the tool to fit various wire sizes, ensuring clean and efficient cuts every time. Perfect for electricians

Ergonomic Non-Slip Handle for Comfort and Control: Experience enhanced comfort and superior grip with the DEKTON Wire Stripping Pliers' ergonomic non-slip handle. Crafted to reduce hand fatigue during prolonged use, this tool provides a secure hold even in slippery conditions. Whether you're working on a complex wiring project or a simple repair,

Durable Steel Construction for Long-Lasting Performance: Built to withstand the toughest jobs, the DEKTON Wire Stripping Pliers feature a durable steel construction that ensures long-lasting performance. This high-quality tool is resistant to wear and tear, making it a reliable addition to any toolbox.

Versatile Tool for All Your Electrical Needs: The DEKTON Wire Stripping Pliers are not just a stripping tool; they're a versatile, multi-functional asset for any professional. Designed for wire cutting, stripping, and crimping, this all-in-one tool streamlines your workflow, saving you time and effort.

Adjustable Stripping Gauge for Customized Precision: Adapt to different wire sizes with ease using the DEKTON Wire Stripping Pliers' adjustable stripping gauge. This feature allows you to fine-tune the tool to match the specific requirements of your project, ensuring accurate and clean stripping every time.
